metadata.title: Der Kommissar
metadata.lyrics:
[01:02.93] Zwei, drei, vier, one, two, three
[01:04.36] It's easy to see
[01:05.20] But it's not that I don't care so
[01:07.12] 'Cause I hear it all the time
[01:08.12] But they never let you know
[01:09.05] On the TV and the radio, cha
[01:11.12] She was young, her heart was pure
[01:12.86] But every night it's price she got
[01:14.80] She said sugar sweet
[01:15.89] You got me rappin' to the beat
[01:17.06] Then I knew that she was hot
[01:18.58] She was singin'
[01:19.49] Don't turn around, woh-uh-oh
[01:22.35] Schau, schau
[01:23.24] Der Kommissar's in town, woh-uh-oh
[01:26.74] You're in his eye
[01:27.84] And you'll know why
[01:28.84] The more you live
[01:30.08] The faster you will die
[01:36.34] Alles klar, Herr Kommissar?
[02:25.62] She said babe you know

[02:30.43] But my street understanding

[02:34.56] And I got to thinking while she was talking

[02:50.00] And if he talks to you

[03:49.05] Hear the children
